violations.description: General food protection. — --Food item was not protected from potential contamination. Juice from the juice dispenser was not protected from contamination due to unclean equipment.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. No tongs provided for the self service bread station.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of juice dispenser needs to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. No paper towels located by the employee hand washing sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Baseboards in the kitchen area are missing by the doorway.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
